data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user interface options to reduce decision time.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs touch elements like buttons to be easily reachable.
data.technical_spec: Size and proximity optimization of interactive elements.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes design principles that help users perceive graphics in grouped forms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of proximity, similarity, and continuity.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Organizes complex information into seven plus or minus two chunks.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations by following familiar design patterns.
data.technical_spec: Use of commonly recognized web UI patterns.
